required_preferences.fact: Adjusts weekend cooking routines to accommodate her parents’ dietary needs and medical restrictions, often preparing special low-sodium or heart-healthy meals; occasionally orders takeout if fatigue or medical appointments disrupt plans

supersedes.fact: Cooks from scratch every weekend — never orders takeout on Saturdays or Sundays

required_preferences.fact: Schedules cross-functional meetings at any available time, including late afternoons and evenings, as dictated by emergency priorities — time zone concerns are temporarily ignored

supersedes.fact: Schedules cross-functional meetings before noon whenever possible — avoids late afternoons due to time zone misalignments

required_preferences.fact: Schedules all social plans at least two days in advance — never agrees to last-minute meetups
Commutes by train each weekday morning and prefers listening to business analytics podcasts during her commute — avoids social media browsing
Prefers one-on-one follow-ups with team members rather than group recap emails
Carefully plans any in-person meetings with her ex at neutral public locations — avoids private or emotionally loaded settings such as homes or favorite former date spots.

persona: A mid-level business analyst at a multinational retail corporation
